news-global-econ.title: CHAD WOLF: America cannot ignore China’s economic attack on US industry
news-global-econ.description: President Trump fights Beijing's dumping strategy that floods U.S. markets with subsidized goods, threatening American steel, auto, and mineral industries.

news-global-econ.title: Democratic socialism is sweeping the nation. Voters should be alarmed
news-global-econ.description: Democratic socialism gains momentum as far-left candidates win primaries in New York City and Washington, DC, raising concerns about policy impacts.

news-global-econ.title: Mississippi law could create statewide registry of undocumented immigrants
news-global-econ.description: Mississippi's new immigration law allows state authorities to compile a list of all illegal immigrants, alarming advocates who fear targeting for deportation.

news-global-econ.description: Infrastructure projects, data centres, real estate and large capital expenditure plans also among investment avenues, he said

news-global-econ.title: Shapoorji refinancing delays spur some bondholders to seek exit
news-global-econ.description: An investment unit of the infrastructure conglomerate has recently been asking creditors to allow it to delay the repayment of the notes with ₹8,343 crore ($884 million) outstanding that mature this month

news-korea-soc.title: Iran targets US with psychological warfare campaign to manipulate Americans, embarrass Trump: experts
news-korea-soc.description: Iran's decapitated leadership has moved its influence operations to X, using covert digital proxies to undermine Trump's nuclear deal, analysts say.

news-global-soc.title: India, China see top firms lose market dominance in AI lag
news-global-soc.description: India, China and Hong Kong have emerged as the only major stock markets worldwide where top companies account for a smaller share of market capitalization than a year ago, underscoring their lag in the global AI race.

news-global-soc.title: Shipping giant warns Strait of Hormuz chaos is 'new normal' as Tehran shifts 4M barrels
news-global-soc.description: Hapag-Lloyd warns of a "new normal" in the Strait of Hormuz as U.S. and Iranian strikes escalate and conflicting routing directives create chaos.
